user_system_path: Prove and fix the public funnel route contract before visual landing polish: route map, CTA behavior, signup/try/demo/start/login/dashboard boundaries, and regression gate.
allowed_files_raw: Source-truth closeout files, Next route redirects, and public-routes regression gate only.
forbidden_files_raw: No landing redesign, dashboard feature work, backend, auth rewrite, Slack/OAuth/API/send, Stripe, Supabase/schema, scoring, conviction, or public asset changes.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity; npm run lint; npm run build; npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list
required_browser_proof: Public route map plus Playwright proof that anonymous CTAs resolve to /start, /demo remains public, and /dashboard redirects to /login.
acceptance_condition: Anonymous public funnel CTAs do not dump users into /dashboard, /signup and /try resolve to /start, /demo remains public, and dashboard stays auth-guarded.
stop_condition: Stop once one issue #120 PR is opened with route map, regression gate, proof, source-truth closeout, and GitHub receipt.
anti_regression_checks: landing CTA hrefs stay /start for anonymous users
/dashboard redirects anonymous users to /login with callbackUrl
next_command: Open one PR for issue #120 public funnel route contract and stop.
